dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.addTaskTip: Tip: press Enter to add a new task quickly.
dashboard.chatDescription: Study resume, request a summary, or ask a quick question.
dashboard.sidebarTip: Tip: click in the dark area to close the sidebar.
dashboard.feedbackSubtitle: Any suggestions or bug reports are welcome. This helps "Study with Teto" become even better.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Set display, language, and chat preferences.

privacy.pageSubtitle: Control your data and privacy settings.
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help us improve by sharing anonymous usage data
privacy.analyticsDisabled: Analytics is disabled - we will not collect usage data
privacy.exportDesc: Download a copy of your settings and personal data
privacy.exportHelp: Your data will be downloaded as a JSON file that you can keep or import elsewhere.
privacy.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
